1.premise: New partners hate hearing about an ex's sexual preferences.
Unsafe sex can turn herpes into an additive risk.
Drunken vomiting during sex implies sex should have stopped earlier.
Being called toxic can prompt a literal body-toxicity insult.

lines.text: she would love it when I spit in her mouth.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And my new girlfriend hates when I mention that.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: First time we hooked up, I didn't have a condom,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: so I tells her, "Hey, you better not have herpes,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "because then I will have double herpes."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Last weekend, she got so drunk, she threw up on my cock.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah, so next time, I'm just going to let her sleep.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: - I was telling that story last night
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and this woman in the crowd called me toxic.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was like, that's pretty rich coming from somebody
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that bleeds out of their goddamn crotch.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Okay, that's enough for me, thank you.
lines.label: fluff
